add-multi-line-text-watermark.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Watermark to PDF
add-multi-line-text-watermark.description: Creates a sample PDF and adds a multi‑line text watermark to each page using FormattedText and Stamp.

rotate-text-stamp-45-degrees.title: Rotate Text Stamp 45 Degrees in PDF
rotate-text-stamp-45-degrees.description: Shows how to create a formatted text stamp, rotate it 45° around its center, and apply it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-background-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Background Stamp to All PDF Pages
apply-background-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a stamp as a background on every page of a PDF document.

apply-pdf-template-stamp-to-page.title: Apply PDF Template Stamp to Specific Page
apply-pdf-template-stamp-to-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to stamp a PDF with an external template PDF, applying the stamp only to the third page of the source document.

combine-image-text-pdf-stamp.title: Combine Image and Text into a PDF Stamp
combine-image-text-pdf-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a single stamp that contains both a logo image and custom formatted text, then apply it to a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API.

add-header-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header Stamp to All PDF Pages
add-header-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF document's pages and add a centered header stamp containing a company name to each page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footer-date-stamp-to-last-pdf-page.title: Add Footer Date Stamp to Last PDF Page
add-footer-date-stamp-to-last-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to insert a footer containing the current date (MM-dd-yyyy) on the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

apply-rotating-text-stamps.title: Apply Rotating Text Stamps to Each PDF Page
apply-rotating-text-stamps.description: Shows how to add a text stamp to every page of a PDF and set a different rotation angle for each page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-background-watermark-to-specific-pdf.title: Add Background Watermark to Specific PDF Pages
add-background-watermark-to-specific-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a background text watermark using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and apply it to pages 2‑5 of a PDF document.

batch-multi-line-watermark-pdf.title: Batch Add Multi‑Line Watermark to PDFs
batch-multi-line-watermark-pdf.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and apply the same multi‑line text watermark as a background stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

stamp-pdfs-with-image-preserve-filenames.title: Add Image Stamp to PDFs and Preserve Filenames
stamp-pdfs-with-image-preserve-filenames.description: Iterates through PDF files in a folder, applies an image stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and saves the stamped PDFs to a separate output directory while keeping the original file names.

overlay-disclaimer-pdf-first-page.title: Overlay Disclaimer PDF on First Page Using PdfFileStamp
overlay-disclaimer-pdf-first-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to overlay a disclaimer PDF as a background on the first page of another PDF.

apply-50-percent-opacity-text-watermark.title: Apply 50% Opacity Text Watermark to PDF Pages
apply-50-percent-opacity-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to add a translucent text watermark to all pages of a PDF using PdfFileStamp and setting the stamp opacity to 50%.

apply-rotated-image-stamp-bottom-right.title: Apply Rotated Image Stamp to Bottom Right of PDF Pages
apply-rotated-image-stamp-bottom-right.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp rotated 30° to the bottom‑right corner of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-page-number-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Page Number Stamp to PDF
add-page-number-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a TextStamp with the {page_number} placeholder and applying it to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multi-line-watermark.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Watermark to PDF from Memory Stream
add-multi-line-watermark.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, loading it from a memory stream, and adding a multi‑line text watermark with custom font size and color.

add-footer-stamp-10-points-above-bottom.title: Add Footer Stamp 10 Points Above Bottom Edge
add-footer-stamp-10-points-above-bottom.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp to add a footer stamp to each page of a PDF and position it exactly 10 points above the page bottom via the bottom margin parameter.

apply-stamp-to-even-pages.title: Apply Stamp to Even Pages of a PDF
apply-stamp-to-even-pages.description: Shows how to add a PDF page stamp only to even-numbered pages using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-qr-code-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add QR Code and Text Stamp to PDF for Product Verification
add-qr-code-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates stamping a PDF with a QR code image and accompanying verification text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-text-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.title: Apply Text Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
apply-text-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to create a text stamp and apply it only to pages 1, 5, and 10 of a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.

overlay-image-stamp-on-pdf.title: Overlay Image Stamp on PDF Pages
overlay-image-stamp-on-pdf.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp that overlays existing content on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-header-barcode-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header Barcode Image to Each PDF Page
add-header-barcode-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to generate a barcode‑like image for each page and add it as a header stamp to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-transparent-text-stamp-to-selected-p.title: Add Transparent Text Stamp to Selected PDF Pages
add-transparent-text-stamp-to-selected-p.description: Shows how to create a formatted text stamp with 70% opacity and apply it as a watermark to specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

custom-font-text-stamp.title: Create Branded Text Stamp with Custom TrueType Font
custom-font-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to load a TrueType font from file and use it in a TextStamp to add branded text to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-number-stamp-leading-zeros.title: Add Page Number Stamp with Leading Zeros to PDF
add-page-number-stamp-leading-zeros.description: Demonstrates how to add a page‑number stamp formatted with leading zeros to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-apply-rotated-stamp.title: Batch Apply Rotated PDF Page Stamp to Multiple PDFs
batch-apply-rotated-stamp.description: Creates a stamp PDF and applies it with a 45° rotation to a set of PDFs (simulating a network share) using Aspose.Pdf facades.

add-right-aligned-logo-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Right-Aligned Logo Stamp to PDF Pages
add-right-aligned-logo-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp (logo) on every page of a PDF and align it to the right margin using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-semi-transparent-png-background-st.title: Apply Semi-Transparent PNG Background Stamp to PDF
apply-semi-transparent-png-background-st.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent PNG image as a background stamp that covers the entire page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-text-stamp-1-5-line-spacing.title: Apply Text Stamp with 1.5 Line Spacing to PDF
apply-text-stamp-1-5-line-spacing.description: Demonstrates adding a multi‑line text watermark with simulated 1.5 line spacing by using an extra blank line in the formatted text. Utilizes Aspose.Pdf.Facades to bind, configure, and apply the stamp to all pages.

add-creation-date-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Creation Date Stamp to PDF Pages
add-creation-date-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF's creation date (or use the current date) and add it as a text stamp in the top‑left corner of every page using Aspose.Pdf.

merge-cover-page-background-pdf.title: Merge Cover Page as Background Using PdfFileStamp
merge-cover-page-background-pdf.description: Shows how to use PdfFileStamp and Stamp to apply the first page of a cover PDF as a background on all pages of another PDF.

image-and-text-stamp-confidential.title: Create Image and Bold Text Stamp (Confidential) on PDF
image-and-text-stamp-confidential.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to build a stamp that combines a company logo image with bold red "Confidential" text and apply it to all pages of a PDF document.

apply-multi-line-watermark-custom-line-h.title: Apply Multi-Line Watermark with Custom Line Height
apply-multi-line-watermark-custom-line-h.description: Demonstrates creating a multi-line text stamp with explicit line spacing and adding it as a semi-transparent background watermark to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-rotated-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Text Stamp to PDF Pages
add-rotated-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to create a formatted text stamp, rotate it 90 degrees, and apply it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-footer-with-automatic-page-count.title: Add Footer with Automatic Page Count to PDF
add-footer-with-automatic-page-count.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a gray footer and dynamic page numbering (Page # of {page_count}) to each page of a PDF.

combine-multiple-pdf-stamps.title: Combine Multiple PDFs as Stamps onto a Single PDF
combine-multiple-pdf-stamps.description: Demonstrates how to create a target PDF and apply multiple PDF pages as stamps using PdfFileStamp.

apply-custom-rubber-stamp-border.title: Apply Custom Rubber Stamp with Border to PDF
apply-custom-rubber-stamp-border.description: Shows how to add a rubber‑stamp annotation to a PDF page using PdfContentEditor and then customize its border thickness and interior color.

batch-add-rotated-image-stamp.title: Batch Add Rotated Image Stamp to First Page of PDFs
batch-add-rotated-image-stamp.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of PDF files and apply a rotated image stamp to the first page of each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages
apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to use PdfFileStamp and Stamp from Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a single image stamp to every page of a PDF in one operation.

stamp-pdf-with-file-name-header.title: Add File Name Header Stamp to PDF
stamp-pdf-with-file-name-header.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade to add a header containing the {file_name} placeholder to each page of a PDF and save the stamped document.

apply-background-image-stamp-30-opacity.title: Apply Background Image Stamp with 30% Opacity
apply-background-image-stamp-30-opacity.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp as a background to all pages of a PDF and setting its opacity to 30% using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-multi-line-text-watermark__v2.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Watermark with Varying Font Sizes
add-multi-line-text-watermark__v2.description: Shows how to apply a multi‑line text watermark to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, with each line rendered in a different font size to create visual hierarchy.

add-barcode-stamp.title: Add Barcode Stamp to PDF
add-barcode-stamp.description: Creates a sample PDF, generates a barcode from the document's unique identifier, and stamps the barcode onto the PDF.

apply-rotated-text-stamp-odd-pages.title: Apply Rotated Text Stamp to Odd Pages
apply-rotated-text-stamp-odd-pages.description: Shows how to add a 30‑degree rotated text stamp to the left margin of every odd‑numbered page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-dynamic-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Text Stamp to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
add-dynamic-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a text stamp that includes the current date and author via string interpolation, bind it to a PDF with PdfFileStamp, and save the stamped document.

add-repeating-background-watermark-stamp.title: Add Repeating Background Watermark Stamp to PDF
add-repeating-background-watermark-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply a single background stamp containing a watermark image to every page of a PDF document.

add-qr-code-stamp-from-pdf-metadata.title: Add QR Code Stamp from PDF Metadata
add-qr-code-stamp-from-pdf-metadata.description: The example reads a PDF's metadata, generates a QR‑code image via an online service, and stamps the QR‑code onto the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

add-multi-line-colored-header-stamp.title: Add Multi‑Line Colored Header Stamp to PDF
add-multi-line-colored-header-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to create a multi‑line header stamp with different font colors using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and place it at the top of each PDF page.

add-lower-roman-page-numbers-odd-pages.title: Add Lower-Roman Page Numbers to Odd Pages
add-lower-roman-page-numbers-odd-pages.description: Demonstrates how to stamp lower‑case Roman numerals as page numbers on only the odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.
